policy: Cloud sync remains optional, credential-gated, privacy-noted, and deterministic last-write-wins.

checks.label: Sync requires authenticated token
checks.detail: Remote writes must derive user_id from a real authenticated token.

checks.label: Cloud progress uses one snapshot row
checks.detail: Sync Alpha writes one user_progress snapshot row.

checks.label: Access token is session-only in UI
checks.detail: Access token must not be saved to persistent localStorage.

checks.label: Sync privacy notice is visible
checks.detail: The UI must tell the learner what sync stores and how conflicts are resolved.

checks.label: Sync Alpha policy exists
checks.detail: SYNC_ALPHA_POLICY.md must keep the privacy and conflict contract explicit.
